application.yml:
server:
  port: 8080

spring:
  datasource:
    url: jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/privod_next
    username: privod
    password: privod_secret
    driver-class-name: org.postgresql.Driver
    hikari:
      maximum-pool-size: 20
      minimum-idle: 5
      idle-timeout: 300000
      connection-timeout: 30000

  jpa:
    hibernate:
      ddl-auto: validate
    open-in-view: false
    show-sql: false
    properties:
      hibernate:
        format_sql: true
        default_schema: public
        jdbc:
          time_zone: UTC

  flyway:
    enabled: true
    locations: classpath:db/migration
    baseline-on-migrate: true

  mail:
    host: localhost
    port: 1025
    username:
    password:
    properties:
      mail:
        smtp:
          auth: false
          starttls:
            enable: false
        from: noreply@privod.ru

  jackson:
    serialization:
      write-dates-as-timestamps: false
    default-property-inclusion: non_null

  thymeleaf:
    prefix: classpath:/templates/
    suffix: .html
    mode: HTML
    encoding: UTF-8

app:
  scheduler:
    enabled: true
  email:
    from-address: noreply@privod.ru
    from-name: "Привод - Строительная ERP"
    base-url: http://localhost:3000
  jwt:
    secret: CHANGE_ME_IN_PRODUCTION_256_BIT_SECRET_KEY_HERE
    expiration-ms: 86400000
    refresh-expiration-ms: 604800000

management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      exposure:
        include: health,info,metrics,prometheus
  endpoint:
    health:
      show-details: when-authorized

logging:
  level:
    com.privod: DEBUG

springdoc:
  api-docs:
    path: /api-docs
  swagger-ui:
    path: /swagger-ui
    operations-sorter: method
    tags-sorter: alpha
application-dev.yml:
spring:
  flyway:
    enabled: false
  jpa:
    hibernate:
      ddl-auto: update
    show-sql: true

logging:
  level:
    org.hibernate.SQL: DEBUG
    org.hibernate.type.descriptor.sql.BasicBinder: TRACE
    com.privod: TRACE
